basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 3 Attendant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website. The last date to apply online is 30-07-2026, so applicants are advised to submit their forms well before the deadline to avoid last-minute issues. age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for Attendant posts is 45 Years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.details: Attendant: Minimum 10th pass with a minimum of 02 years of experience in colleges/schools' hostels.

salary_details.details: Attendant: Consolidated salary of ₹23,947/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Attendant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Attendant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Indore Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Indore Attendant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Attendant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Attendant: Minimum 10th pass with a minimum of 02 years of experience in colleges/schools' hostels.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Attendant Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit for Attendant posts is 45 Years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Attendant Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Attendant: Consolidated salary of ₹23,947/- per month.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Attendant Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Attendant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Attendant posts at IIT Indore is 30th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Attendant post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Attendant position is a 10th pass. Additionally, candidates must possess at least two years of relevant work experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Attendant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Attendant posts is 45 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Attendant position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Attendant post will receive a consolidated salary of ₹23,947/- per month. This is a fixed monthly remuneration for the contract period.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Attendant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Attendant post in the IIT Indore recruitment drive. This number might be subject to change as per organizational requirements.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Indore Attendant recruitment is entirely online. Interested candidates need to fill out the application form through the provided online link.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Attendant posts?
faq.answer: Based on the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for the Attendant recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Contract job. Candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis for the Attendant positions at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q9. What is the required experience for the Attendant role?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Attendant post must have a minimum of 02 years of experience working in colleges or schools' hostels. This experience is crucial for the role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. Please ensure you review all details before applying.
